name: GangStars
overview: KrishnaDas is a gangster. The doctor tells das that he has a stomach cancer. Ajay dream to become a filmmaker. Keerthi is the niece of a film stars manager. Vishwa and Aishwarya breakup during shooting refuse to work. Das threatens Ajay and Keerthi to act together. How they complete the film and does Das realise the truth of his medical condition?

trailers.title: GangStars - OFFICIAL TRAILER 2018 | Telugu TV Series | Jagapathi Babu | Prime Exclusive
